description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two test jobs. The first job, oldtests, runs in the default test stage using the python:3.10 image, executes 'pip install pytest numpy', 'pip install -e .', and 'pytest', and is set to manual execution. The second job, tests, also runs in the test stage using the python:3.13 image, creates a virtual environment, activates it, upgrades pip, installs flake8, mypy, coverage, pytest, interrogate and numpy, installs the package, configures coverage process startup, runs coverage with pytest, combines coverage data, reports with a fail‑under of 87.0%, generates HTML coverage, runs mypy, flake8 and interrogate checks, and publishes the htmlcov directory as an artifact that expires in one week, with a coverage regex '/TOTAL +[0-9]+ +[0-9]+ +([0-9]+\.[0-9]+%)/'.
